_meta.description: Default seed data for the HealthCheck module. Loaded via Data Management → Load Default Data. Uses ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING so safe to run multiple times.

hc_module_config.description: Health poller configuration — interval, timeout, retry settings, and poller start timestamp.
General module settings — default values for new applications.
Global SLA configuration — single SLA target % applied to all categories marked for SLA calculation. Measured monthly.
Planned downtime source configuration — where to fetch planned maintenance windows.

hc_categories.name: Source Interfaces
hc_categories.description: Source interface applications and inbound data feeds.

hc_categories.name: Infrastructure
hc_categories.description: Core infrastructure services — DNS, load balancers, databases.

hc_applications.name: Google Homepage
hc_applications.description: Google homepage — page text monitoring. Checks for 'Google' in the HTML response body.

hc_applications.name: GitHub API Status
hc_applications.description: GitHub Status API — JSON endpoint that returns current platform status. Monitors API response code 200.

hc_applications.name: JSONPlaceholder REST API
hc_applications.description: JSONPlaceholder fake REST API — fetches post #1 and checks for expected title text in JSON response.

hc_applications.name: httpbin HTTP Status Check
hc_applications.description: httpbin status endpoint — returns HTTP 200. Used to test basic connectivity and response code monitoring.

hc_applications.name: Microsoft Azure Status Page
hc_applications.description: Microsoft Azure status page — page text monitoring. Verifies 'Azure' appears in the response HTML.
